function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I followed the OCR/migration workflow and added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all 8 requested finance documents while preserving their existing body content, then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before edits, read lane AGENTS files before entering folders, preserved original note bodies, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence in the 8 listed finance source notes provided all required schema fields and line items; finance schema defined required keys; migration workflow required frontmatter insertion while preserving body; inbox workflow required deleting processed inbox request after successful completion.
